label: New — Grow Guides on every plant
items: A new Grow Guide tab on every plant species card in the Shed and on every plant instance. Generate a comprehensive AI guide covering nine areas: watering, soil, sunlight, propagation, germination, pruning, flowering, harvesting, and the plant's life cycle.

Each section has a summary, concrete key facts (frequency, depth, spacing), step-by-step how-to where it applies, tips, and an optional caveat. Sections that don't apply to a plant (e.g. harvesting on an ornamental) are gracefully hidden.
Generated once per species and cached — every visit after the first loads instantly. A daily background job re-checks each guide every 90 days and refreshes only the sections that actually changed.

Available across all plant sources: AI, Manual, Perenual, and Verdantly. Manual plants get a best-effort guide built from the name + your notes. Generating requires the AI tier; viewing existing guides is open to all tiers.

label: Small rename
items: The existing "Guides" tab (community user-written guides) is now labelled "Community" so it's clearly distinct from the new Grow Guide tab. Content is unchanged.
